name: Heidi Grant Murphy
abstract: Heidi Grant Murphy (born 1965) is an American operatic soprano and academic voice teacher. A member of the Metropolitan Opera since 1989, she appeared at international opera houses, and made recordings.

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Mays
about_quotes.evidence: I wrote for two of their albums... That particular group... they were lucky enough to get Heidi Grant Murphy, a wonderful opera singer, to be part of that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bill Mays interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 5, 2025
